evals.name: fresh-nodejs
evals.prompt: Set up context engineering for this project. Just say 'go' when you present findings.
evals.expected_output: AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, hooks, session management, leverage score, token budget

assertions.text: AGENTS.md exists and is under 200 lines
AGENTS.md has Commands section with exact flags
CLAUDE.md exists and is under 50 lines
Hooks configuration generated (auto-format, branch protection, PostCompact)
Token budget reported with HEALTHY/WARNING/CRITICAL status
'Push further' prompt with specific next action

evals.name: python-existing-config
evals.prompt: Set up context engineering for this project. It already has a CLAUDE.md. Improve what exists.
evals.expected_output: Token bomb detected, CLAUDE.md split, AGENTS.md created, soft negatives fixed

assertions.text: Detected 216-line CLAUDE.md as token bomb (>200 lines)
CLAUDE.md reduced or split (not kept at 216 lines)
Soft negatives found and rewritten (don't/avoid -> MUST)

evals.name: monorepo
evals.prompt: Set up context engineering for this monorepo. Just say 'go' when you present findings.
evals.expected_output: AGENTS.md, subdirectory CLAUDE.md per package, monorepo-aware content

assertions.text: Subdirectory CLAUDE.md files created for existing packages
No CLAUDE.md created for nonexistent directories
